title: Cassaba and Sweet Tagine
description: A Chinese-inspired dessert made with cassaba and sweet ingredients, showcasing a unique twist on traditional Chinese flavors.

ingredients.name: x
ingredients.notes: crushed or minced for best results

ingredients.name: tra
ingredients.notes: diced or sliced for optimal texture

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Peel the cassaba and chop it into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, mix together the chopped cassaba, sweet, and tra.
Add the crushed x to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
